title: Pan-Fried Chinese Spring Pancakes
description: A simple and delicious Chinese-inspired pancake recipe made with a mixture of flour, water, and bean paste.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour and salt. Gradually add in the spring water and mix until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes elastic and smooth.
Divide the dough into 8-10 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball of dough into a thin circle.
Brush one side of each dough circle with the sesame oil.
Place a tablespoon of bean paste in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough over the bean paste to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal.
Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes on each side, until they are golden brown and crispy.
Serve the pancakes hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
